page.title: Category:2600th Anniversary Celebrations of the Japanese Empire

revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[ja:Category:皇紀2600年]] [[commons:Category:2600th Anniversary Celebrations of the Japanese Empire]] [[ko:Category:황기 2600년]] [[zh:Category:皇紀2600年]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Sky Day]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Qq
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "DEFAULTSORT:" to "citation needed|"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Merge [[Category:昭和時代戦前の文化]] into [[Category:Culture of Prewar Shōwa Period]] via bot
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[神武天皇即位紀元|皇紀]]2600年（西紀[[1940年]]）の記念行事に関連する記事のカテゴリ。
{{DEFAULTSORT:こうき2600ねん}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|こうき2600ねん}} {{Commons category|2600th Anniversary Celebrations of the Japanese Empire}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:皇紀2600年]]}} {{translated page|ja|Category:皇紀2600年|version=28352066}} [[Category:1940 in Japan]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Culture of Prewar Shōwa Period]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]] [[commons:Category:2600th Anniversary Celebrations of the Japanese Empire]] [[ja:Category:皇紀2600年]] [[ko:Category:황기 2600년]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Sky Day]] [[zh:Category:皇紀2600年]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
